center.name: 多貝拉伊半島
center.summary: 多貝拉伊半島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Red-billed brushturkey、斑皇鸠、Blue-fronted fig parrot等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Salawati and the Bird's Head Peninsula in New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits forest canopy, forest edges, and cleared areas bordering forests at high elevations in mountains in the Central Range and the Huon Peninsula, but is absent from the Bird's Head Peninsula

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An Indonesian endemic, the Red-billed Brushturkey inhabits to lowland forests on Vogelkop Peninsula, western Snow Mountains, and Misool Island of West Papua

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in forest, woodland, mangrove, plantations and scrub in Southeast Asia, ranging from Myanmar and Thailand, throughout Indonesia and east to the Philippines (where it is locally known as camasu and balud-puti) and the Bird's Head Peninsula in New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-banded mannikin (Lonchura vana), or grey-banded munia, is a species of estrildid finch known to be found in Anggi Gigi, Tamrau Mountains, and Arfak Mountains in the Vogelkop Peninsula in north-western Papua, Indonesia
